headline: Data Storage Stocks Have Had a Great Year So Far. It Could Be About to Get Better.
summary: Strong results from "pick-and-shovel" AI plays Sandisk, Western Digital, and Seagate, could add fuel to the stocks' recent runup, along with growing commitments to AI spending by America's tech giants.

headline: Pre-Q3 Earnings: Is Sandisk Stock a Portfolio Must-Have?

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Western Digital Price Target to $500: Is the HDD Squeeze Just Getting Started?
summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) received price target raises from Cantor Fitzgerald to $500 from $420, maintaining an Overweight rating, and Bank of America to $495 from $415, keeping a Buy rating. Both calls rest on a structural HDD supply squeeze that could drive durable pricing power for Western Digital stock. Wall Street is consolidating around one ... headline: Seagate Price Target Soars to $700 at BofA and Cantor Fitzgerald: Is the HDD Boom Going Vertical?
summary: Two major Wall Street firms independently lifted their price targets on Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) to $700 on Monday, citing structural tightness in the hard disk drive market and the ramp of next-generation HAMR storage. Bank of America (BofA) raised its STX stock price target from $605 while reiterating a Buy rating, and Cantor Fitzgerald lifted ...
